name: flash-crash-a-trading-savant-a-global-manhunt-and-the-most-mysterious-market-crash-in-history
description: Liam Vaughan's true story of Navinder Sarao, the British trader who used spoofing to manipulate markets and allegedly triggered the 2010 Flash Crash — a financial thriller about algorithmic trading, criminal investigation, and market fragility.
useCase: Understand the 2010 Flash Crash, spoofing, market manipulation, high-frequency trading, and how one trader affected global markets.
knownRisks: Some may dispute the extent of Sarao's role in the Flash Crash
Technical concepts may require basic market knowledge
The legal case is complex and ongoing in some aspects
